ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Shirts, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Brand A, Brand B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., XS, S) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Chest, Waist) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement in inches or centimeters */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size combination */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product-size combination */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory location */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product-size combination in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the inventory record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES inventory_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory location (e.g., Store A, Warehouse B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inventory location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the inventory location */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product-size combination */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product-size combination sold */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory location */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of sale */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES inventory_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "guide_text" TEXT /* Text of the size guide */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image or diagram for the size guide */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size guide is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory manager, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access log is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory adjustment */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "quantity_adjusted" INTEGER /* Quantity adjusted (positive for restock, negative for return) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "adjusted_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the adjustment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the adjustment record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_adjustments_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_adjustments_adjusted_by FOREIGN KEY ("adjusted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size popularity record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score (e.g., based on sales) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the popularity score was last updated */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Trend of sales (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the popularity record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_popularity_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_popularity_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)
